response.overview: Santiago, 2005. Vale and Sofi (12), after hearing that Sofi's sister is being called "lesbian" and "faggot," decide to launch a secret investigation to discover what that words mean. Between dictionaries, espionage, and dressing up as pokemonas, their mission ends when they see the sister kissing a girl. Could it be that they are faggots too?
response.title: Mariconcitas
